text: Created ticket Migrate worker package and tool surfaces onto shared storage

Began t-0053 after closing the critique/docs/Ralph slice. Read the worker store, worker/manager tools, worker models, and the ticket context to scope the migration. Confirmed that pi-workers still uses the old file-backed store directly for durable worker history while runtime launch descriptors and clone-local attachment details are already separated in the runtime layer. The next cutover needs to preserve that runtime carve-out while moving durable worker history and tool surfaces onto @pi-loom/pi-storage.

Verification complete: npm test -- --run packages/pi-workers/__tests__/store.test.ts packages/pi-workers/__tests__/tools.test.ts packages/pi-workers/__tests__/commands.test.ts packages/pi-workers/__tests__/index.test.ts packages/pi-workers/__tests__/runtime.test.ts (5 files / 40 tests passed) and npm run typecheck passed. Durable worker history now flows through async canonical shared-storage APIs for worker/manager command and tool surfaces; launch/runtime descriptors remain local-only and are not stored as canonical shared state.
